items.title:
[正面] This game really surprised men good way
Morimen h...
items.summary:
This game really surprised men good way
Morimen has super unique gameplay that feels different from most games out there. The mechanics are pretty deep, so it can be a bit tricky at first, but once you get the hang of it, it’s really satisfying to play

Every move feels like it matters, and the more you play, the more you start to appreciate how much skill the game actually requires. It’s one of those games where you can really feel yourself getting better, and that makes it hard to put down

If you enjoy games that challenge you and feel rewarding when you improve, Morimen is definitely worth checking out.
